SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.web
Package com.hack23.cia.web.impl.ui.application.views.contracts

Interface IView

All Superinterfaces:
java.io.Serializable, com.vaadin.navigator.View
All Known Subinterfaces:
IAdminView, IUserView
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractActorView, AbstractAdminView, AbstractGroupView, AbstractPersonView, AbstractRankingView, AbstractUserView, AbstractView, AdminAgencyView, AdminApplicationConfigurationView, AdminApplicationEventsView, AdminApplicationSessionView, AdminCountryView, AdminDataQualityView, AdminDataSummaryView, AdminEmailView, AdminLanguageView, AdminMonitoringView, AdminPortalView, AdminUseraccountView, AgentOperationView, BallotView, CommitteeRankingView, CommitteeView, CountryRankingView, DashboardView, DocumentsView, DocumentView, GovernmenBodyView, GovernmentBodyRankingView, MainView, MinistryRankingView, MinistryView, ParliamentRankingView, PartyRankingView, PartyView, PoliticianRankingView, PoliticianView, SearchDocumentView, UserHomeView
public interface IView extends com.vaadin.navigator.View
The Interface IView. Base contract for all views in the application. This interface breaks circular dependencies by providing a stable contract that common infrastructure can depend on without depending on concrete view implementations.
